Name: -1_art_obama_similar_sense
Representative_Docs: ["Yes. They always have a strong sense of aesthetic concepts and utilizes layering of different elements  in order to create a unique sense of taste. Their taste is different from everyone else's but has a lot in common with experienced artists and craftspeople. They do not tend to like popular things, but rather what appeals to them personally. Other people usually like their aesthetic choices.", 'Michelle Obama has good taste.  Both in character and in works of art, books and poetry, and general preferences.  She has an appreciation for beauty and grace and for recognizing the efforts of others in their pursuits an work.  She recognizes art for what it represpents and aspirations it may bring forth', "Yes, I know several people who I think have great taste. My grandmothers come to mind, they were ladies to the T but also real women who exuded grace under extreme pressure, made it look so easy to manage home and hearth, raise several children successfully, I mean nobody wants to be the parent of a Jeffrey Dahmer right? The matriarchs of my family instilled in me the belief that I could be anything I wanted and how to be a lady while achieving my goals. I never heard a swear word from either of them, they didn't gossip, run the streets, stir up trouble or have their business aired around town. They were very much the type of women who were gracious, humble, grateful, intelligent, witty and just had this quality about them that is the essence of great taste."]

Name: 0_music_friend_movies_enjoys
Representative_Docs: ["A friend of mine who doesn't like listening to metal music but who understands the value in it. He also understands the difficulty in performing and how there is a type of music for everyone. This is an example where I would completely disagree with their opinion, but that doesn't necessarily mean they have bad taste. They also enjoy other forms of music that I also enjoy.", 'Right now I can only think of my son. Of all the people I can recall, he is the only one with a taste similar to mine. Since I believe I have "good taste" I raised my son to enjoy the same types of movies and books that I enjoy. Of course, I didn\'t force it upon him, and at first, he found many of the movies boring, but gradually, over time he began to appreciate the type of art I enjoy.', "I think that my best friend has good taste in movies because we both enjoy the same kinds of movies. For example, we both love marvel movies so I'd say she has good taste."]

Name: 1_clothes_look_friend_dresses
Representative_Docs: ['This person has good taste because they can dress in style all the time.  Their clothes match and fits nicely.  Their shoes and watch are a good complement to their clothes.', 'I think RR has good taste because she always dresses well with nicely coordinated accessories.  The clothes she picks  are very fits well and the colors patterns seem to blend well.  She never dresses slovenly or wears clothes whose colors and patterns clash.', 'A friend of mine has very good taste in clothes. They wear things that fit their body and style, and they look great.']
